testsuite.name: com.kilu.pocketagent.ProtocolStateMachineTest

testcase.name: 401 and 403 clear session consistently across ALL endpoints
submit result twice handles idempotent 409 properly
server returns 200 with semantically broken payload fails closed
approve without a valid plan yields null and logs fail-closed
mint step batch without valid grant yields null
poll queue after lease shows empty items array instead of bare block

testsuite.system-out: [ControlPlaneApi] D: submitResult HTTP=403 task=tsk_abc [ControlPlaneApi] D: submitResult HTTP=409 task=tsk_already_done [ControlPlaneApi] D: pollQueue ok items=0
testsuite.system-err: [ControlPlaneApi] E: pollQueue auth error 401 [ControlPlaneApi] E: approvePlan auth error 403 [ControlPlaneApi] E: mintStepBatch auth error 401 [ControlPlaneApi] E: submitResult auth error 403 [ControlPlaneApi] E: approvePlan error kotlinx.serialization.MissingFieldException: Field 'grant_id' is required for type with serial name
